intended_use: LVivo platform is intended for non-invasive processing of ultrasound images to detect, measure, and calculate relevant medical parameters of structures and function of patients with suspected disease.
intended_use_full: LVivo platform is intended for non-invasive processing of ultrasound images to detect, measure, and calculate relevant medical parameters of structures and function of patients with suspected disease. In addition, it has the ability to provide Quality Score feedback.
target_condition: Left ventricular function assessment; suspected cardiac disease
ground_truth: Study 1: Quality tagging by experienced sonographers; Study 2: Visual estimation per ACEP Guidelines and clinical interpretability assessment by expert echocardiologist
other_metrics: Overall agreement between LVivo IQS quality tagging and experienced sonographer tagging: 81% (Study 1); 90% of patients with visual image quality 3-5 achieved at least 'Medium' quality score by LVivo IQS (Study 2); 93% of saved clips were clinically interpretable by expert echocardiologist (Study 2)
